description:
Kerbal Space Program is a space flight simulation game where you design and
fly rockets to explore the Kerbol system.  Parts are randomized across the
multiworld, and mission completions are the location checks.

experimental.description:
MUST be used with an up to date version of: https://github.com/nickdavies/KSP1-Archipelago-client/releases/tag/experimental

This experimental branch adds support for non-kerbin bodies. New goal was added for a local Jool based run:

```
name: TestPlayer
game: Kerbal Space Program 1

Kerbal Space Program 1:
  starting_body: laythe
  goal: jool_moons_return
  difficulty: normal
  start_with_launch_clamps: true
  exclude_late_tech_tree: true
```

Expect bugs and balance problems. Especially when it comes to science as it's not scaled down from the stock values for alien bodies! The AP logic knows how much science is available but it does make the tree a little easy to unlock.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.3.0...experimental
experimental.title: Experimental Release latest features with the most bugs

v0.1.1.description:
First minimally working version. Should be playable enough to be fun. If you do play and find bugs please report them to: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/issues

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.1.0...v0.1.1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.1.1...v0.1.3
v0.1.3.title: v0.1.3

v0.2.0.description:
- Added support for custom goals and added mun pre-packaged goals
- Added support for using explain rocket over Universal Tracker
- Fixed known logic bugs and significantly hardened the core logic rules against silly bugs.
- Added locations for EVA while orbiting every body except Kerbol
- Many bug fixes!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.1.3...v0.2.0
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

v0.2.1.description: Fix bug with how the new code for UT was shipped
v0.2.1.title: v0.2.1

v0.3.0.description:
I added progressive launch pad now. So this will limit the maximum weight your rocket can be. Similar to stock but you get a warning in the VAB if you exceed it and it's not quite as well integrated as having the real career mode weight limits.

Other major changes are mostly internal to how it generates seeds but the hope is that:
 1) Mun flag missions and Duna return missions I am to be 99%+ success rate for generation. If you find any failing seeds I would love to know them and any settings you used.
 2) Flag on every body should be 95%+ Success now and the biggest/longest run which is sample return from all bodies (except Eve, Laythe, Tylo) is now around 85% success rate. If you wish to raise this rate take out the Vall Surface Return mission.
 3) Significantly higher variance in runs than before
 4) You should NOT need to put in a capsule now in starting inventory. You should always be able to quickly get to flying
 5) Added local-only locations for all your starting inventory along "Science from KSC" and  "First Launch" so you are guaranteed to be able to get off the ground with local-only checks. All checks after this (including early altitude records are open)
 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.2.2...v0.3.0
v0.3.0.title: v0.3.0
